title: [RU]HorrorTubers totems of undying
description: Totems with (almost) all RU horror minecraft youtubers skins
body:
**With this resourcepack you can rename your totem of undying to any of youtubers nicknames, and it will change skin**

**To obtain any totem you must rename default totem to nickname of any youtuber you want.
List of all:**

v1.0:
itszhaba, 
DregIr, 
denterrxsq, 
zxsdwp, 
Halsochenko, 
luvrain, 
Sl_Andeku, 
F_Alek, 
Mr_Hang01, 
Mr_Haos003, 
Jesus117

v1.0.1:
Fogix0_0

v1.0.2:
fuckwhypxrlch, 
klpxsn3x, 
VILIAN, 
Gleb_Globus

**If you want to add your skin to pack, contact me in telegram (@itszhabo)

PACK WORKS ONLY WITH OPTIFINE OR CIT RESEWN**
